auth.welcomeSubtitle: Where stars align and hearts connect
auth.termsAgreement: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

onboarding.addPhotosSubtitle: Add at least 2 photos to get started
onboarding.astrologyPrefsSubtitle: What matters to you in a match?
onboarding.honestyNote: Be honest — our algorithms work best with real data. Garbage in, garbage out!
onboarding.honestyNoteSubtitle: The more accurate your info, the better your matches. No pressure... okay, a little pressure.
onboarding.birthDataDisclaimer: Your birth data helps us calculate astrological compatibility. Please be as accurate as possible!
onboarding.palmistryUploadNote: Upload a clear photo of your palm for palmistry analysis. Real hands only — your cousin's hand won't help your love life.
onboarding.palmistryHowTo: Use good lighting, spread your fingers naturally, and photograph your dominant hand.

compatibility.title: Compatibility
compatibility.disclaimer: Real talk: this is just our algorithm's best guess, not destiny written in stone. We're pretty clever, but we're not cupid. Use these scores as a fun conversation starter, not a life decision.
compatibility.palmistryDisclaimer: Palmistry analysis is experimental and just for fun. Your palm lines are cool, but they're not a crystal ball.

chat.title: Messages
chat.startConversation: Start a conversation with your matches

referral.title: Referrals
referral.referSubtitle: Know someone perfect for a friend? Refer them!

disclaimers.general: Heads up: Our compatibility scores are generated by algorithms we built with love (and caffeine). They're fun, insightful, and surprisingly accurate — but they're not perfect. No algorithm can fully capture the magic between two people. Trust your gut, not just our numbers.
disclaimers.honesty: Please be honest when entering your information. Our algorithms can only work their magic with real data. If you fib about your birth time, that's between you and the stars.
disclaimers.palmistry: Palmistry features are experimental and offered for entertainment. Please upload a clear, well-lit photo of your own palm. We promise we won't judge your lifeline.
disclaimers.notPerfect: Built with love, math, and a healthy dose of humility. Our algorithm is smart, but it's not a fortune teller. Think of it as a really well-read friend who's good with numbers.
disclaimers.dataPrivacy: Your birth data and palm images are encrypted and used only for compatibility calculations. We take your cosmic data as seriously as we take your privacy.

errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.authError: Authentication failed. Please sign in again.
errors.validationError: Please check your input and try again.
errors.photoUploadError: Failed to upload photo. Please try again.
